Migration rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

1	import type { FC } from 'react';
     2	import { useWatch } from 'react-hook-form';
     3	
     4	import ExpandableReviewSection from '@components/ExpandableReviewSection/ExpandableReviewSection';
     5	import {
     6	  DescriptionList,
     7	  DescriptionListDescription,
     8	  DescriptionListGroup,
     9	  DescriptionListTerm,
    10	  Flex,
    11	  FlexItem,
    12	  Title,
    13	  useWizardContext,
    14	} from '@patternfly/react-core';
    15	import { useForkliftTranslation } from '@utils/i18n';
    16	
    17	import { planStepNames, PlanWizardStepId } from '../../constants';
    18	import { useCreatePlanFormContext } from '../../hooks/useCreatePlanFormContext';
    19	import { HooksFormFieldId, MigrationHookFieldId } from '../migration-hooks/constants';
    20	import { hooksFormFieldLabels } from '../migration-hooks/utils';
    21	
    22	const HooksReviewSection: FC = () => {
    23	  const { t } = useForkliftTranslation();
    24	  const { goToStepById } = useWizardContext();
    25	  const { control } = useCreatePlanFormContext();
    26	  const [preMigration, postMigration] = useWatch({
    27	    control,
    28	    name: [HooksFormFieldId.PreMigration, HooksFormFieldId.PostMigration],
    29	  });
    30	
    31	  return (
    32	    <ExpandableReviewSection
    33	      title={planStepNames[PlanWizardStepId.Hooks]}
    34	      testId="review-hooks-section"
    35	      onEditClick={() => {
    36	        goToStepById(PlanWizardStepId.Hooks);
    37	      }}
    38	    >
    39	      <Flex direction={{ default: 'column' }} spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsXl' }}>
    40	        <FlexItem>
    41	          <DescriptionList isHorizontal horizontalTermWidthModifier={{ default: '18ch' }}>
    42	            <Title headingLevel="h4">{t('Pre migration hook')}</Title>
    43	
    44	            {preMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.EnableHook] ? (
    45	              <>
    46	                <DescriptionListGroup>
    47	                  <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>
    48	                  <DescriptionListDescription data-testid="review-pre-migration-hook-enabled">
    49	                    {t('True')}
    50	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
    51	                </DescriptionListGroup>
    52	
    53	                <DescriptionListGroup>
    54	                  <DescriptionListTerm>
    55	                    {hooksFormFieldLabels[MigrationHookFieldId.HookRunnerImage]}
    56	                  </DescriptionListTerm>
    57	                  <DescriptionListDescription>
    58	                    {preMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.HookRunnerImage]}
    59	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
    60	                </DescriptionListGroup>
    61	
    62	                <DescriptionListGroup>
    63	                  <DescriptionListTerm>
    64	                    {hooksFormFieldLabels[MigrationHookFieldId.AnsiblePlaybook]}
    65	                  </DescriptionListTerm>
    66	                  <DescriptionListDescription>
    67	                    {preMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.AnsiblePlaybook] ?? t('None')}
    68	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
    69	                </DescriptionListGroup>
    70	              </>
    71	            ) : (
    72	              <DescriptionListGroup>
    73	                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>
    74	                <DescriptionListDescription data-testid="review-pre-migration-hook-enabled">
    75	                  {t('False')}
    76	                </DescriptionListDescription>
    77	              </DescriptionListGroup>
    78	            )}
    79	          </DescriptionList>
    80	        </FlexItem>
    81	
    82	        <FlexItem>
    83	          <DescriptionList isHorizontal horizontalTermWidthModifier={{ default: '18ch' }}>
    84	            <Title headingLevel="h4">{t('Post migration hook')}</Title>
    85	
    86	            {postMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.EnableHook] ? (
    87	              <>
    88	                <DescriptionListGroup>
    89	                  <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>
    90	                  <DescriptionListDescription data-testid="review-post-migration-hook-enabled">
    91	                    {t('True')}
    92	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
    93	                </DescriptionListGroup>
    94	
    95	                <DescriptionListGroup>
    96	                  <DescriptionListTerm>
    97	                    {hooksFormFieldLabels[MigrationHookFieldId.HookRunnerImage]}
    98	                  </DescriptionListTerm>
    99	                  <DescriptionListDescription>
   100	                    {postMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.HookRunnerImage]}
   101	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
   102	                </DescriptionListGroup>
   103	
   104	                <DescriptionListGroup>
   105	                  <DescriptionListTerm>
   106	                    {hooksFormFieldLabels[MigrationHookFieldId.AnsiblePlaybook]}
   107	                  </DescriptionListTerm>
   108	                  <DescriptionListDescription>
   109	                    {postMigration[MigrationHookFieldId.AnsiblePlaybook] ?? t('None')}
   110	                  </DescriptionListDescription>
   111	                </DescriptionListGroup>
   112	              </>
   113	            ) : (
   114	              <DescriptionListGroup>
   115	                <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   116	                <DescriptionListDescription data-testid="review-post-migration-hook-enabled">
   117	                  {t('False')}
   118	                </DescriptionListDescription>
   119	              </DescriptionListGroup>
   120	            )}
   121	          </DescriptionList>
   122	        </FlexItem>
   123	      </Flex>
   124	    </ExpandableReviewSection>
   125	  );
   126	};
   127	
   128	export default HooksReviewSection;

content.text:
Now let me analyze the code. The migration rule says:

> In PatternFly v6, icon content in `<DescriptionListTerm>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

Looking at all 8 flagged lines (47, 54, 63, 73, 89, 96, 105, 115), **none of them contain icon elements**. Every `<DescriptionListTerm>` in this file contains only text content:

- Line 47: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 54-56: `<DescriptionListTerm>{hooksFormFieldLabels[...]}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 63-65: `<DescriptionListTerm>{hooksFormFieldLabels[...]}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 73: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 89: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 96-98: `<DescriptionListTerm>{hooksFormFieldLabels[...]}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 105-107: `<DescriptionListTerm>{hooksFormFieldLabels[...]}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text
- Line 115: `<DescriptionListTerm>{t('Enabled')}</DescriptionListTerm>` — plain text

The migration rule specifically applies when a `<DescriptionListTerm>` contains an **icon element** (from `@patternfly/react-icons`). None of the `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances in this file contain any icon elements — they all contain only text (either `t('Enabled')` or `hooksFormFieldLabels[...]`). There is no icon to move to the `icon` prop.

## Changes Applied

**No changes applied.** The migration rule does not apply to this file. All `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances contain only text content (translation strings or label lookups) — none contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule's condition (icon content as children) is not met at any of the flagged lines.
